title: AGENTOBS AuditPayload
description: RFC-0001 §7.2, §11 — Payload for security and audit chain control events in the llm.audit.* namespace. Audit events are special: they appear in-band within the HMAC audit chain itself, enabling verifiable records of cryptographic operations without out-of-band logging. Current event types: llm.audit.key.rotated (HMAC key was rotated; §11.5). Reserved: llm.audit.chain.verified, llm.audit.chain.tampered.

AuditKeyRotatedPayload.title: AuditKeyRotatedPayload
AuditKeyRotatedPayload.description: RFC-0001 §11.5 — Payload for llm.audit.key.rotated. MUST be inserted into the AuditStream before the new key takes effect. Verifiers that receive a key_map argument MUST use this record to know when a new secret becomes authoritative for subsequent signatures.

key_id.description: RFC-0001 §11.5 — Opaque, non-secret identifier for the new HMAC signing key. MUST uniquely identify the new key within this org_id. MUST NOT be the key material itself.

previous_key_id.description: RFC-0001 §11.5 — Opaque identifier for the key that was active before this rotation. Used by verifiers to look up the correct secret for events signed before the rotation.

rotated_at.description: RFC-0001 §11.5 — UTC ISO 8601 timestamp with microsecond precision at which the key rotation took effect. Events after this timestamp in the AuditStream are signed with the new key.

rotated_by.description: Actor or system that performed the key rotation.

rotation_reason.description: Human-readable justification for the key rotation (e.g. scheduled, suspected compromise, compliance requirement).

key_algorithm.description: HMAC algorithm used with the new key. MUST be 'HMAC-SHA256' per RFC-0001 §11.2.

effective_from_event_id.description: ULID of the first event in the stream that is signed with the new key. All events with this ID or later MUST be verified using the new key.

AuditChainVerifiedPayload.title: AuditChainVerifiedPayload
AuditChainVerifiedPayload.description: Payload for llm.audit.chain.verified (reserved) — a segment of the audit chain was programmatically verified as intact. Inserted by automated compliance tooling.

verified_from_event_id.description: ULID of the first event in the verified range.

verified_to_event_id.description: ULID of the last event in the verified range.

event_count.description: Number of events in the verified range.

verified_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp with microsecond precision at which verification ran.

verified_by.description: System or actor that performed verification.

AuditChainTamperedPayload.title: AuditChainTamperedPayload
AuditChainTamperedPayload.description: Payload for llm.audit.chain.tampered (reserved) — audit chain verification detected tampering: at least one invalid signature, gap, or reordering was found.

first_tampered_event_id.description: RFC-0001 §11.4 — ULID of the first event with an invalid signature.

tampered_count.description: RFC-0001 §11.4 — Total number of events with invalid signatures.

gap_count.description: RFC-0001 §11.4 — Number of prev_id references pointing to missing events (evidence of deletion).

gap_prev_ids.description: RFC-0001 §11.4 — List of prev_id values that point to missing events.

detected_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp with microsecond precision at which tampering was detected.

detected_by.description: System or actor that detected the tampering.
